lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰੂ ਗੁਰੁ ਗੁਰੁ ਕਰਹੁ ਗੁਰੂ ਹਰਿ ਪਾਈਐ ॥
lines.translit: guroo gur gur karahu guroo har paaeeai |
lines.english: Chant Guru, Guru, Guru; through the Guru, the Lord is obtained.

lines.gurmukhi: ਉਦਧਿ ਗੁਰੁ ਗਹਿਰ ਗੰਭੀਰ ਬੇਅੰਤੁ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮ ਨਗ ਹੀਰ ਮਣਿ ਮਿਲਤ ਲਿਵ ਲਾਈਐ ॥
lines.translit: audadh gur gahir ganbheer beant har naam nag heer man milat liv laaeeai |
lines.english: The Guru is an Ocean, deep and profound, infinite and unfathomable. Lovingly attuned to the Lord's Name, you shall be blessed with jewels, diamonds and emeralds.

lines.gurmukhi: ਫੁਨਿ ਗੁਰੂ ਪਰਮਲ ਸਰਸ ਕਰਤ ਕੰਚਨੁ ਪਰਸ ਮੈਲੁ ਦੁਰਮਤਿ ਹਿਰਤ ਸਬਦਿ ਗੁਰੁ ਧੵਾਈਐ ॥
lines.translit: fun guroo paramal saras karat kanchan paras mail duramat hirat sabad gur dhayaaeeai |
lines.english: And, the Guru makes us fragrant and fruitful, and His Touch transforms us into gold. The filth of evil-mindedness is washed away, meditating on the Word of the Guru's Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤ ਪਰਵਾਹ ਛੁਟਕੰਤ ਸਦ ਦ੍ਵਾਰਿ ਜਿਸੁ ਗੵਾਨ ਗੁਰ ਬਿਮਲ ਸਰ ਸੰਤ ਸਿਖ ਨਾਈਐ ॥
lines.translit: amrit paravaah chhuttakant sad dvaar jis gayaan gur bimal sar sant sikh naaeeai |
lines.english: The Stream of Ambrosial Nectar flows constantly from His Door. The Saints and Sikhs bathe in the immaculate pool of the Guru's spiritual wisdom.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮੁ ਨਿਰਬਾਣੁ ਨਿਧਾਨੁ ਹਰਿ ਉਰਿ ਧਰਹੁ ਗੁਰੂ ਗੁਰੁ ਗੁਰੁ ਕਰਹੁ ਗੁਰੂ ਹਰਿ ਪਾਈਐ ॥੩॥੧੫॥
lines.translit: naam nirabaan nidhaan har ur dharahu guroo gur gur karahu guroo har paaeeai |3|15|
lines.english: Enshrine the Naam, the Name of the Lord, within your heart, and dwell in Nirvaanaa. Chant Guru, Guru, Guru; through the Guru, the Lord is obtained. ||3||15||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰੂ ਗੁਰੁ ਗੁਰੂ ਗੁਰੁ ਗੁਰੂ ਜਪੁ ਮੰਨ ਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: guroo gur guroo gur guroo jap man re |
lines.english: Chant Guru, Guru, Guru, Guru, Guru, O my mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਕੀ ਸੇਵ ਸਿਵ ਸਿਧ ਸਾਧਿਕ ਸੁਰ ਅਸੁਰ ਗਣ ਤਰਹਿ ਤੇਤੀਸ ਗੁਰ ਬਚਨ ਸੁਣਿ ਕੰਨ ਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: jaa kee sev siv sidh saadhik sur asur gan tareh tetees gur bachan sun kan re |
lines.english: Serving Him, Shiva and the Siddhas, the angels and demons and servants of the gods, and the thrity-three million gods cross over, listening to the Word of the Guru's Teachings.

lines.gurmukhi: ਫੁਨਿ ਤਰਹਿ ਤੇ ਸੰਤ ਹਿਤ ਭਗਤ ਗੁਰੁ ਗੁਰੁ ਕਰਹਿ ਤਰਿਓ ਪ੍ਰਹਲਾਦੁ ਗੁਰ ਮਿਲਤ ਮੁਨਿ ਜੰਨ ਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: fun tareh te sant hit bhagat gur gur kareh tario prahalaad gur milat mun jan re |
lines.english: And, the Saints and loving devotees are carried across, chanting Guru, Guru. Prahlaad and the silent sages met the Guru, and were carried across.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਰਹਿ ਨਾਰਦਾਦਿ ਸਨਕਾਦਿ ਹਰਿ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਹਿ ਤਰਹਿ ਇਕ ਨਾਮ ਲਗਿ ਤਜਹੁ ਰਸ ਅੰਨ ਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: tareh naaradaad sanakaad har guramukheh tareh ik naam lag tajahu ras an re |
lines.english: Naarad and Sanak and those men of God who became Gurmukh were carried across; attached to the One Name, they abandoned other tastes and pleasures, and were carried across.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦਾਸੁ ਬੇਨਤਿ ਕਹੈ ਨਾਮੁ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਲਹੈ ਗੁਰੂ ਗੁਰੁ ਗੁਰੂ ਗੁਰੁ ਗੁਰੂ ਜਪੁ ਮੰਨ ਰੇ ॥੪॥੧੬॥੨੯॥
lines.translit: daas benat kahai naam guramukh lahai guroo gur guroo gur guroo jap man re |4|16|29|
lines.english: This is the prayer of the Lord's humble slave: the Gurmukh obtains the Naam, the Name of the Lord, chanting Guru, Guru, Guru, Guru, Guru, O my mind. ||4||16||29||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਰੀ ਗੁਰੂ ਸਾਹਿਬੁ ਸਭ ਊਪਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: siree guroo saahib sabh aoopar |
lines.english: The Great, Supreme Guru showered His Mercy upon all;

lines.gurmukhi: ਸ੍ਰੀ ਪ੍ਰਹਲਾਦ ਭਗਤ ਉਧਰੀਅੰ ॥
lines.translit: sree prahalaad bhagat udhareean |
lines.english: He saved the devotee Prahlaad,

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰੀ ਕ੍ਰਿਪਾ ਸਤਜੁਗਿ ਜਿਨਿ ਧ੍ਰੂ ਪਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: karee kripaa satajug jin dhraoo par |
lines.english: in the Golden Age of Sat Yuga, He blessed Dhroo.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਧਿਕ ਸਿਧ ਸਗਲ ਸਰਣਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: saadhik sidh sagal saranaaee |
lines.english: The Siddhas and seekers all seek His Sanctuary.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਸ੍ਤ ਕਮਲ ਮਾਥੇ ਪਰ ਧਰੀਅੰ ॥
lines.translit: hast kamal maathe par dhareean |
lines.english: placing the Lotus of His Hand upon his forehead.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕੇ ਬਚਨ ਸਤਿ ਜੀਅ ਧਾਰਹੁ ॥
lines.translit: gur ke bachan sat jeea dhaarahu |
lines.english: True are the Words of the Guru's teachings. Enshrine them in your soul.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਲਖ ਰੂਪ ਜੀਅ ਲਖੵਾ ਨ ਜਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: alakh roop jeea lakhayaa na jaaee |
lines.english: The Unseen Form of the Lord cannot be seen.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਣਸ ਜਨਮੁ ਦੇਹ ਨਿਸ੍ਤਾਰਹੁ ॥
lines.translit: maanas janam deh nistaarahu |
lines.english: Emancipate your body, and redeem this human incarnation.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰੁ ਜਹਾਜੁ ਖੇਵਟੁ ਗੁਰੂ ਗੁਰ ਬਿਨੁ ਤਰਿਆ ਨ ਕੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: gur jahaaj khevatt guroo gur bin tariaa na koe |
lines.english: The Guru is the Boat, and the Guru is the Boatman. Without the Guru, no one can cross over.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਨਿ ਲਹਣਾ ਥਾਪਿ ਜੋਤਿ ਜਗਿ ਧਾਰੀ ॥
lines.translit: tin lahanaa thaap jot jag dhaaree |
lines.english: He established Lehnaa as Guru, and enshrined His Light in the world.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਪਾਈਐ ਗੁਰ ਬਿਨੁ ਮੁਕਤਿ ਨ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: gur prasaad prabh paaeeai gur bin mukat na hoe |
lines.english: By Guru's Grace, God is obtained. Without the Guru, no one is liberated.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰੁ ਨਾਨਕੁ ਨਿਕਟਿ ਬਸੈ ਬਨਵਾਰੀ ॥
lines.translit: gur naanak nikatt basai banavaaree |
lines.english: Guru Nanak dwells near the Creator Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਲਹਣੈ ਪੰਥੁ ਧਰਮ ਕਾ ਕੀਆ ॥
lines.translit: lahanai panth dharam kaa keea |
lines.english: Lehnaa established the path of righteousness and Dharma,

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਮਰਦਾਸ ਭਲੇ ਕਉ ਦੀਆ ॥
lines.translit: amaradaas bhale kau deea |
lines.english: which He passed on to Guru Amar Daas, of the Bhalla dynasty.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਨਿ ਸ੍ਰੀ ਰਾਮਦਾਸੁ ਸੋਢੀ ਥਿਰੁ ਥਪੵਉ ॥
lines.translit: tin sree raamadaas sodtee thir thapyau |
lines.english: Then, He firmly established the Great Raam Daas of the Sodhi dynasty.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਕਾ ਨਾਮੁ ਅਖੈ ਨਿਧਿ ਅਪੵਉ ॥
lines.translit: har kaa naam akhai nidh apyau |
lines.english: He was blessed with the inexhaustible treasure of the Lord's Name.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਪੵਉ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਅਖੈ ਨਿਧਿ ਚਹੁ ਜੁਗਿ ਗੁਰ ਸੇਵਾ ਕਰਿ ਫਲੁ ਲਹੀਅੰ ॥
lines.translit: apyau har naam akhai nidh chahu jug gur sevaa kar fal laheean |
lines.english: He was blessed with the treasure of the Lord's Name; throughout the four ages, it is inexhaustible. Serving the Guru, He received His reward.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਰਤਖਿ ਦੇਹ ਪਾਰਬ੍ਰਹਮੁ ਸੁਆਮੀ ਆਦਿ ਰੂਪਿ ਪੋਖਣ ਭਰਣੰ ॥
lines.translit: paratakh deh paarabraham suaamee aad roop pokhan bharanan |
lines.english: The Guru's Body is the Embodiment of the Supreme Lord God, our Lord and Master, the Form of the Primal Being, who nourishes and cherishes all.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬੰਦਹਿ ਜੋ ਚਰਣ ਸਰਣਿ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਵਹਿ ਪਰਮਾਨੰਦ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਕਹੀਅੰ ॥
lines.translit: bandeh jo charan saran sukh paaveh paramaanand guramukh kaheean |
lines.english: Those who bow at His Feet and seek His Sanctuary, are blessed with peace; those Gurmukhs are blessed with supreme bliss.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਗੁਰੁ ਸੇਵਿ ਅਲਖ ਗਤਿ ਜਾ ਕੀ ਸ੍ਰੀ ਰਾਮਦਾਸੁ ਤਾਰਣ ਤਰਣੰ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: satigur gur sev alakh gat jaa kee sree raamadaas taaran taranan |1|
lines.english: So serve the Guru, the True Guru; His ways and means are inscrutable. The Great Guru Raam Daas is the Boat to carry us across. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਹ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤ ਬਚਨ ਬਾਣੀ ਸਾਧੂ ਜਨ ਜਪਹਿ ਕਰਿ ਬਿਚਿਤਿ ਚਾਓ ॥
lines.translit: jih amrit bachan baanee saadhoo jan japeh kar bichit chaao |
lines.english: The Holy people chant the Ambrosial Words of His Bani with delight in their minds.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਨੰਦੁ ਨਿਤ ਮੰਗਲੁ ਗੁਰ ਦਰਸਨੁ ਸਫਲੁ ਸੰਸਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: aanand nit mangal gur darasan safal sansaar |
lines.english: The Blessed Vision of the Guru's Darshan is fruitful and rewarding in this world; it brings lasting bliss and joy.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਸਾਰਿ ਸਫਲੁ ਗੰਗਾ ਗੁਰ ਦਰਸਨੁ ਪਰਸਨ ਪਰਮ ਪਵਿਤ੍ਰ ਗਤੇ ॥
lines.translit: sansaar safal gangaa gur darasan parasan param pavitr gate |
lines.english: The Guru's Darshan is fruitful and rewarding in this world, like the Ganges. Meeting Him, the supreme sacred status is obtained.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਘੁਬੰਸਿ ਤਿਲਕੁ ਸੁੰਦਰੁ ਦਸਰਥ ਘਰਿ ਮੁਨਿ ਬੰਛਹਿ ਜਾ ਕੀ ਸਰਣੰ ॥
lines.translit: raghubans tilak sundar dasarath ghar mun banchheh jaa kee saranan |
lines.english: He is certified, like the handsome Ram Chander in the house of Dasrath of the Raghwa dynasty. Even the silent sages seek His Sanctuary.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੀਤਹਿ ਜਮ ਲੋਕੁ ਪਤਿਤ ਜੇ ਪ੍ਰਾਣੀ ਹਰਿ ਜਨ ਸਿਵ ਗੁਰ ਗੵਾਨਿ ਰਤੇ ॥
lines.translit: jeeteh jam lok patit je praanee har jan siv gur gayaan rate |
lines.english: Even sinful people conquer the realm of Death, if they become the Lord's humble servants, and are imbued with the Guru's spiritual wisdom.
